description: Custom card input fields for Expanded Checkout — PCI DSS compliant

card_fields_setup.step_2: Create card fields session via sdkInstance
card_fields_setup.step_3: Render individual field elements into containers
card_fields_setup.step_4: Handle form submission and card tokenization

styling.description: Pass CSS-like styles to Card Fields for consistent branding

events.onChange: Fired when field value changes — use for validation UI
events.onInputSubmitRequest: Fired when user presses Enter in a field

submission.method: Call submit on the card fields session to tokenize and process
submission.triggers_3ds: 3D Secure is triggered automatically when required

v5_pattern.initialization: const cardFields = paypal.CardFields({ createOrder, onApprove, onError, style })

pci_compliance.description: Card Fields are PCI DSS compliant — PayPal handles card data in iframes. Your page never touches raw card data.
required_disclosure: Include text: 'By paying with your card, you acknowledge that your data will be processed by PayPal subject to the PayPal Privacy Statement.'
Include disclosure in your privacy notice

best_practices: Always check card eligibility before rendering fields
Style card fields to match your site branding for trust
Show real-time validation feedback using onChange events
Display card brand icon as user types card number
Handle 3D Secure automatically — do not skip
Provide clear error messages for declined cards
Include cardholder name field for better authorization rates
